---
title: "Eva Glossary"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
library(flextable)
library(stringr)
```

```{r table, message=F, warning=F}
# created with saveRDS(gloss, file = 'sandbox/glossary.rds')
# but can use a CSV instead
gloss <- readRDS(file = 'glossary.rds')

gloss$Definition <- str_squish(gloss$Definition)
gloss$Definition <- str_wrap(gloss$Definition, width = 80)
gloss$Term <- str_wrap(gloss$Term, width = 40)

flextable(gloss) |>
  autofit() |>
  border_inner() |>
  border_outer() |>
  fit_to_width(max_width = 7.5)
```
